evidence.text: He recently was admitted for a    ventral hernia repair and was eventually discharged to HRC.

evidence.display: On [**9-28**]    the pt presented from rehab with fevers, hypotension, and an al
evidence.text: On [**9-28**]    the pt presented from rehab with fevers, hypotension, and an altered    mental status all c/w sepsis due to MRSA bacteremia.

evidence.display: His course in the    MICU has been complicated by persistent fevers, serial posi
evidence.text: His course in the    MICU has been complicated by persistent fevers, serial positive blood    cultures and hypoxemia as well as an impaired mental status.

evidence.display: The pt    remains a Full Code.
evidence.text: The pt    remains a Full Code.

evidence.text: Hypotension (not Shock)    Assessment:    SBP in low 80 s, maps in 40    Action:    Total; 2 lits of NS bloused.

evidence.text: Response:    Sbp in 100 s, maps in mid 50 s., SBP dropped again @ MN.
RIJ inserted @    1 am.
Started levophed @ 0.03 mics/kg/min.
CVP was 10.SBP > 100  .
Plan:    Monitor  BP, I/O,CVP.

evidence.display: Hypoxemia    Assessment:    Spo2 maintained in high 90 s on 50 % O2.
evidence.text: Hypoxemia    Assessment:    Spo2 maintained in high 90 s on 50 % O2.

evidence.display: Action:    Pt sat upright in bed.

Chest PT provided.
Pt encouraged to cough/deep    breath.

evidence.text: Oral suctioning done, obtained large to moderate amts of thick    blood tinged secretions.

evidence.display: Response:    Pt  on 50% FiO2 venti-mask with nl sats in the high 90    Plan:
evidence.text: Response:    Pt  on 50% FiO2 venti-mask with nl sats in the high 90    Plan:    Cont to turn freq, sit pt upright, encourage cough/deep breathing,    provide chest PT and provide additional NTS if all else fails.

evidence.text: Dressing change information printed from pt chart and posted on pts    room for convenience.
